title: Donut Schematics
description: Browse, search, download schematics, preview maps, and check auction prices from Donut.build directly inside Minecraft. Not affiliated with the DonutSMP.
body:
# Donut Schematics

Browse, search, download schematics, preview maps, and check auction prices from Donut.build directly inside Minecraft.

Donut Schematics is a companion mod for [donut.build](https://donut.build) that brings Donut.build tools into the game. You can discover and save schematics without leaving Minecraft, preview map art before buying it on DonutSMP, and check item auction values directly from your inventory.

Not affiliated with the DonutSMP.

## Features

### Browse and Download Schematics In-Game

Open the Donut Schematics menu, search for builds, and download schematics directly to your `schematics` folder.

No more opening a browser, downloading files manually, dragging them into folders, or organizing schematic downloads yourself.

### Map Preview Tooltips

Hover over a filled map to preview what the map looks like directly in the tooltip.

### Auction House Price Tooltips

Hover over an item in your inventory to see its estimated Auction House value.

## How It Works

1. Open the Donut Schematics menu in-game by pressing `B`
2. Browse or search for a build
3. Click download
4. The schematic is automatically saved to your `schematics` folder
5. Use it with Litematica

No manual file management required.

## Keybind

The default keybind for opening Donut Schematics is `B`.

This can be changed at any time through the Minecraft Controls / Keybinds settings menu.

![Donut Schematics Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc66bed9f8daf5d8d1b52d841d9291ddbf142b4.png)

## Requirements

* Fabric API
* Fabric Language Kotlin
* Litematica

## Links

* Website: https://donut.build
